# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

#
SQSQueue:
  Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
  Properties:
    # https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-sqs-queues.html
    QueueName: test-queue
    Attributes:
      VisibilityTimeout: '30'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1200

SQSTopicPolicyForPublishSubscribe:
  Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
  Properties:
    # https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-sns-policy.html#cfn-sns-topic-policy
    PolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: "sqs.amazonaws.com" # for queues
          Action: ["SQS:SendMessage", "SQS:DeleteMessage"]
#
QueuePolicyForPublishSubscribe:
  Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
  Properties:
    QueueName: !Ref SQSQueue # https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-sqs-queues.html
    PolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: "sns.amazonaws.com" # for topics
          Action: ["SNS:Publish"]

end_of_text

#
SQSTopicPolicyForPublishSubscribe:
  Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
  Properties:
    PolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: "sqs.amazonaws.com" # for queues
          Action: ["SQS:SendMessage", "SQS:DeleteMessage"]

QueuePolicyForPublishSubscribe:
  Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
  Properties:
    PolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: "sns.amazonaws.com" # for topics
          Action: ["SNS:Publish"]
end_of_text

#
SQSTopicPolicyForPublishSubscribe:
  Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
  Properties:
    PolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: "sqs.amazonaws.com" # for queues
          Action: ["SQS:SendMessage", "SQS:DeleteMessage"]
end_of_text
